claim_results.claim: Nothing in it is "produce" or "achieve." The connection IS the life; the science is the evidence trail, not the trail itself.
I’m writing it this way on purpose â€” because the Bible described this process completely, precisely, and practically long before anyone knew what a neurotransmitter was.
Because in the pit, one thing happens that cannot happen anywhere else: you stop trusting yourself.
God shows up when you’ve stopped trying to clean yourself up.
Not because God needs permission â€” because love doesn’t override.
That voice requires a listening posture.
Because the connection was restored and the life flows. “Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, the new creation has come: The old has gone, the new is here!” (2 Corinthians 5:17).
It produces fruit because it’s alive.

- Surrender: “Submit yourselves, then, to God” (James 4:7) - Give thanks: “Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God’s will for you” (1 Thessalonians 5:18) - Ask: “You do not have because you do not ask God” (James 4:2) - Listen: “Be still, and know that I am God” (Psalm 46:10) - Stay connected: “Remain in me, as I also remain in you” (John 15:4) Notice: everything in your column is receptive.
Any claim that turns a structural resemblance into a proven mechanism belongs here until the math, experiment, or textual chain can carry the weight.
Possible overstatement: language that sounds final should be read as a working model unless the article explicitly proves it.
Rigor & Kill Conditions Every claim is held to explicit falsification standards.

Kill if: The companion neuroscience piece (and the broader recovery literature) shows no measurable physical change in the brain along the surrender → thanksgiving → listening pathway — the "evidence trail" then doesn't exist.

Kill if: The fruit-of-the-Spirit transformation (Galatians 5:22–23) is not observable as overflow in long-term practitioners of the daily architecture — the connection-IS-the-life claim has no behavioral signature.
Just Scripture and the process it describes for how God brings a person from the bottom back to life.” The Bible described the path first; the science is the evidence trail.
Article 21 is the equation statement.
The article's claim: God shows up when you've stopped trying to clean yourself up, not after.
Testimony as evidence: “Many will see and fear the Lord and put their trust in him.”
The article's only data source by deliberate design — the Bible described this process completely and practically long before neuroscience existed. “The science is the evidence trail.

Companion piece (Article 21) confirms each stage of the process — thanksgiving lowers cortisol, surrender activates vmPFC rather than dlPFC, listening remodels the PFC, oxytocin and serotonin pathways rebuild — with clinical evidence (Cochrane N=10,565).
The framework's coherence equation describing the same process — dC/dt with surrender parameter s and coupling α(s) — lives in Article 21 and is referenced from Article 18.
Not surfaced in this article's body (no equations by design), but for canonical consistency: $S$ is the Master-Equation decay parameter that drives coherence toward zero.

Logos Field ($\chi$) The pervasive substrate of coherent reality — the framework's $\chi$ field; the Master-Equation field whose value is total system coherence. (Earlier drafts denoted this with $\Lambda$; that symbol is now reserved for the cosmological constant.) Field ≠ coupling : this entry locks the substrate sense.
